packageDirectories.versionName: ver 0.3.1 — visible SourceOrg selector, Investment labels
packageDirectories.versionDescription: Visible SourceOrg selector (listselector) in the dashboard top bar across all pages, letting users switch between consolidated orgs on-screen (the aggregateflex pages auto-facet; the SAQL financial steps bind to the selector explicitly); financial dashboard labels reworded from Cost to Investment and the waste terminology removed. View https://github.com/tiagonnascimento/sf-license-manager/blob/main/README.md
